guide.tip_text: Tap highlighted toys to go on. On drag pages, match each word to the right picture. Replace placeholder images with your library photos anytime.

pages.title: My toy room

dialogue.start: This is my toy room. I love my toys!
I've got a teddy.
I've got a doll.
I've got a puppet.
I've got blocks. I've got Legos. I've got a puzzle. Tap the puzzle!
I've got a robot!
Turn the page for colors and outdoor toys.

pages.body_text: This is my toy room. I love my toys!
pages.read_aloud_text: This is my toy room. I love my toys!

dialogue.start: My airplane is white.
My car is red.
My kite is blue and yellow.
I've got a ball, a scooter, and a skateboard. Let's play outside!

pages.title: Puppet & Robot
pages.body_text: Puppet and Robot can't wait for the park.
pages.read_aloud_text: Puppet and Robot can't wait for the park.

dialogue.start: Puppet: The sun is out! Let's go play outside with the scooters and the ball!
Robot: Beep-boop! Outdoor toys — charging up for fun! Tap me!
Puppet: Race you to the grass! Robot: Affirmative! Turn the page for the park!
We can play outside!
I've got a scooter.
I've got a skateboard.
I've got a kite. It can fly high!
Tap the ball two times. First it bounces, then it talks!
Nice playing outside! Turn the page — Teddy and Doll want to talk to you.

pages.title: Teddy & Doll
pages.body_text: Soft friends after a busy day outside.
pages.read_aloud_text: Soft friends after a busy day outside.

dialogue.start: Teddy: Phew! You ran so fast with the ball and the kite. I'm ready to rest.
Doll: Come sit with us. The soft toys want to say hello. Tap me!
Teddy: Tap me for a big teddy hug — then we match words to pictures!
That's my teddy! That's my doll! Now match the words.
Drag each word to the right toy.
Great matching! Turn the page — Robot has a garage surprise.
Robot: Excellent matching! New mission: the garage. Something red is hiding under a blanket.
Robot: Is that… a car? Tap the robot if you're ready to see!
Robot: Let's go! Turn the page for the big reveal.
That's my toy car!
Tap the car. Say it with me: That's my toy car!
You said it! Turn the page — the kite welcomes you to the toy fair.
Kite: Whoosh! Welcome! Drag each word to the right toy at my fair!
Puzzle booth: I've got puzzles, balls, and dolls today. Tap the kite when you're ready!

pages.title: Toy fair

dialogue.start: Drag puzzle, ball, and doll to the pictures.
You did it! I've got a teddy, a robot, a kite — so many toys!

pages.body_text: Match the words at the toy fair!
pages.read_aloud_text: Match the words at the toy fair!

payload.body_text: This is my toy room. I love my toys!
payload.read_aloud_text: This is my toy room. I love my toys!
